message:
feat(e2e): add realdb-e2e CLI skeleton with subcommands (bd-1w6k.3.1)

Add realdb-e2e binary to fsqlite-e2e crate with subcommand dispatch:
corpus scan/import/verify, run, bench, corrupt. corpus scan is wired to
fixture_discovery for live /dp scanning. Full help text for all
subcommands. 11 tests passing. Unblocks 5 downstream beads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
